title: CosmicPack
description: CosmicPack is a texture pack made for Cosmic Prisons, brought to you by the Minecoin team.
body:
### CosmicPack is being continued as CosmicTextures. View the updated project [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmictextures).

# ⛏️ What is CosmicPack?
CosmicPack is a texture pack that was created by the [Minecoin](https://discord.gg/minecoin) team for the server, Cosmic Prisons.

## ✅ Showcase

**Cosmic Energy, Gang Points, & Money**

## ❓ How to add the resource pack and dependency mod to Lunar Client:
- Open Lunar Client's version selector and select version 1.21.8
- Press the ⚙️ button at the bottom right, then select the Mods tab at the top
- Drag the Variants-CIT 4.8.1+1.21.6 mod into the window
- Launch Lunar 1.21.8
- Head to the resource pack option in settings, place the pack zip there
